name: Beike Tripod Q 066
description: 4-section travel tripod, twist lock, height adjustable from 21-51 inches. The center column can be used as a selfie stick. 360 degree swivel ball head works with phone clamp, digital camera, film camera, DSLR, action camera, etc.

features.Key Features:: Material : Aluminium | Section : 4 Section | Max Diameter : 22mm | Min Diameter : 17mm | Tinggi Max : 130cm | Tinggi Dilipat : 29cm | Berat : 0.84kg | Max Load : 8kg
